CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael P. Terrizzi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bay Park Owners Association, Inc.
Carra S. Clampitt, Vice President of Bay Park Homeowners Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants the Sojourner Truth Foster Family Service Agency, Inc., or Alma Jackson.
Default was entered against defendant the Sojourner Truth Foster Family Service Agency, Inc. on October 20, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Alma Jackson on March 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bay Park Owners Association, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants the Sojourner Truth Foster Family Service Agency, Inc. and Alma Jackson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,949.92.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,500.55.
Attorney's Fees - $2,386.00.
Costs - $540.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $47,376.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
